title: teucrium scordium var. glabrescens
intro: Teucrium scordium var. glabrescens, also known as Smooth Wood Sorrel, is a variety of the Wood Sorrel plant, a member of the mint family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Teucrium scordium var. glabrescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
